name: trex-lib
documentation: This is trex core library project

functions.name: trexlib.utils.common.conftest.pytest_addoption
documentation: Add a command line option to disable logger.

functions.name: trexlib.utils.common.common_util.lookahead
documentation:
Pass through all values from the given iterable, augmented by the
information if there are more values to come after the current one
(True), or if it is the last value (False).

classes.name: trexlib.utils.common.common_util.OrderedSet
documentation: A set that preserves insertion order by internally using a dict.

functions.name: trexlib.utils.security_util.hash_password
documentation: DO NOT CHANGE AFTER DEPLOYED TO PRODUCTION

functions.name: trexlib.utils.string_util.safe_str_cmp
documentation:
This function compares strings in somewhat constant time. This
requires that the length of at least one string is known in advance.

Returns `True` if the two strings are equal, or `False` if they are not.
